description: A production Kubernetes cluster is experiencing a complete DNS failure. Service discovery is broken across all namespaces. Initial triage indicates that the CoreDNS configuration was mangled during a recent maintenance window. Your job is to diagnose all DNS-related failures in the 'kube-system' namespace and repair them so that in-cluster name resolution works again. You need to ensure the deployment is scaled correctly, the cluster domain is 'cluster.local', external queries forward to a valid upstream resolver, and the service exposes standard DNS ports. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!

metadata.occupation: Computer Systems Engineer / Site Reliability Engineer
